name: VaultFront
currentFocus: Session 73 full recovery-to-arc mission complete: all 12 ranked audit items and 3 second-order innovations shipped across trusted alpha evidence, replay/rematch integrity, Vault Pressure, deterministic coaching, authoritative progression, public/release truth, CI ratchets, and dependency security.
nextMilestone: Collect authenticated evidence from at least three distinct human alpha sessions on staging, then verify project-domain email, native Obelisk relying-party auth, live web hardening/theme evidence, and founder launch approval before any SPARKED transition.
entropyMethod: Studio protocol entropy: context freshness, truth/IGNIS age, SIL skip pressure, stale human-action labels, and task-bucket pressure.

testingSurfaces.label: Unit and server regression
testingSurfaces.purpose: Vitest core, client, server, and Studio protocol coverage. All 107 files / 697 tests pass in the broad coverage run as of Session 73.

testingSurfaces.label: Production build
testingSurfaces.purpose: TypeScript no-emit plus Vite 7 production bundle; every emitted JavaScript chunk is below 500 kB gzip.

testingSurfaces.label: E2E smoke
testingSurfaces.purpose: Playwright desktop/mobile homepage, settings, manifest, health, environment, and solo-flow smoke. Exact CI profile passes 22/22 serially.

testingSurfaces.label: Local game server
testingSurfaces.purpose: Client and worker stack for manual match, tournament, and HUD checks.

releaseGates: authenticated evidence from at least three distinct human alpha sessions
live CSP/HSTS/Core Web Vitals and theme screenshot evidence
